title: Ubiquiti U-LTE-Pro, UniFi Redundant WAN PRO over LTE
description: In case that your primary WAN connection fails, Ubiquiti U-LTE-Pro will provide a backup mobile internet connection to keep your network online. This model works in the EU and supports the European LTE bands (1, 3, 7, 8, 20, 28) and WCDMA (1 and 8). LTE coverage and speed depends on the mobile network. The device can only work with UniFi Security Gateway or UniFi Dream Machine, and UniFi Network Controller version 5.14.0 or higher is required. This is not a router but an LTE modem that only… Ubiquiti U-LTE-Pro can be placed anywhere where is the best signal, because it can be powered by 802.3at PoE + from a switch such as a UniFI PoE Switch. Wall, adhesive, and desktop mounting options are offered to suit your specific application. This device has a secondary port. This secondary port offers bridging and passive PoE passthrough â useful for a camera, AP, or other device You can view status information on the 1.5" screen (whether the device is in ready mode or active mode). The device has a built-in high-quality LTE antenna, but you can connect also an external antenna with higher gain on the SMA female connector, which is located on the bottom of the device Automatic redundant connection - USG controls logic Integration into UniFi Network networks - support in UniFi Controller from 5.14.0 2Ã2 LTE category 4 (150 Mbps download / 51 Mbps upload) Support for European bands: LTE (1, 3, 7, 8, 20, 28), WCDMA (1, 8) Power over 802.3af/at PoE Nano SIM slot RSMA female for connecting an external LTE antenna 2Ã Gigabit LAN 1.54" display Device Stand + wall mount Screws
